title: Sweet Tender Nutella Jamaican Stir-fry
description: A midnight-craving dish featuring a sweet and creamy twist of Nutella in a tender plant-based Jamaican-style stir-fry, perfect for those who crave something slightly indulgent.

ingredients.name: Tofu or Tempeh cubes
ingredients.notes: Marinated with Nutella and spices for a savory twist

ingredients.name: Cornstarch slurry (1 tbsp cornstarch mixed with 2 tbsp water)

instructions: Marinate tofu or tempeh cubes in Nutella, soy sauce, and a mix of Jamaican spices like allspice, nutmeg, cinnamon for at least 30 minutes.
Heat oil in a wok over medium heat. Add marinated tofu or tempeh cubes, cook until golden brown on both sides.
Add red bell peppers, green onions, and the cornstarch slurry to the pan. Stir-fry until peppers are slightly softened and sauce thickens.
Serve hot as a snack or side dish with rice or quinoa.
